citations.description: File ends at removal-rationale; no asserted-capability or decomp-shape entries present
CANONICAL_LLM, CODEBASE_GROUNDED, AGENT_TIER sets do not include asserted-capability or decomp-shape
list_directory of src/rebar/llm/reviewers/ shows no plan_review_asserted_capability.md or plan_review_decomp_shape.md
list_directory of tests/unit/ shows no test_asserted_capability_criterion.py or test_decomp_shape_criterion.py
list_directory of docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/ shows no asserted_capability_sanity.json or decomp_shape_sanity.json

findings.criterion: Each recommendation R1–R7 landed through Gerrit + closed signed — with R1/R3/R4 re-planned advisory-first. Advisory criteria live directly in the packaged criteria_routing.json + CANONICAL_LLM.
findings.detail: The repository does not contain the R1 (`asserted-capability`) or R3 (`decomp-shape`) criteria. `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/criteria_routing.json` ends at `removal-rationale` with no `asserted-capability` or `decomp-shape` entries. `registry.CANONICAL_LLM` (registry.py lines 79-131) has no `asserted-capability` or `decomp-shape`. The rubric files `plan_review_asserted_capability.md` and `plan_review_decomp_shape.md` are absent from `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/`. The unit tests `test_asserted_capability_criterion.py` and `test_decomp_shape_criterion.py` are absent from `tests/unit/`. The sanity run artifacts `asserted_capability_sanity.json` and `decomp_shape_sanity.json` are absent from `docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/`. Operator-attested child ticket comments (change #805 for R1, #807 for R3) claim Gerrit merges, but the codebase-verifiable state shows none of these changes are reflected in the current repo.

citations.description: list_directory of docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/harnesses/ shows no gate_eval_instrumentation.py or criterion_effectiveness.py
list_directory of docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/ shows no criterion_effectiveness.json
list_directory of tests/unit/ shows no test_criterion_effectiveness.py or test_gate_eval_classifier.py

README has no mention of R7, gate_eval_instrumentation, criterion_effectiveness, or the standing recorder section [docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/README.md (cited lines 1-32 exceed file length 31)]
Final section of plan-review-gate.md ends at line ~675 with no Blocking-FP-proxy demotion section, no criterion_effectiveness reference, no advisory→blocking promotion gate protocol

findings.criterion: Landed changes in the packaged registry, no config-flag, R7 dogfood documented, docs/plan-review-gate.md updated. d8a5's standing effectiveness recorder + the advisory→blocking promotion-gate protocol are documented in docs/plan-review-gate.md.
findings.detail: The R7 deliverable `docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/harnesses/gate_eval_instrumentation.py` is absent from the harnesses directory. The d8a5 deliverables `docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/harnesses/criterion_effectiveness.py`, `docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/criterion_effectiveness.json`, and `tests/unit/test_criterion_effectiveness.py` are all absent. The experiments README (`docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/README.md`) has no mention of gate_eval_instrumentation, R7, criterion_effectiveness, or the standing recorder. The `docs/plan-review-gate.md` file (read fully through its ~675 lines) contains no 'Blocking-FP-proxy demotion' section, no 'criterion_effectiveness' reference, no 'promotion' protocol, and no 'sidecar-findings-alone' methodological note — all of which are required by both the R7 child ticket and the epic's AC4.

citations.description: Opening of plan-review-gate.md — no mention of R7/d8a5 additions or promotion-gate protocol in first 80 lines
End of plan-review-gate.md — document ends without Blocking-FP-proxy demotion section or criterion_effectiveness references

findings.criterion: Success criterion: The plan-review methodology remains documented — docs/plan-review-gate.md reflects every landed change.
findings.detail: docs/plan-review-gate.md does not reflect the R7 dogfood instrumentation, the d8a5 standing recorder, the advisory→blocking promotion-gate protocol (referenced by R1/R3/R4 as the gate they monitor), or the blocking-FP-proxy demotion rule. These are all claimed landed in the reconciled ACs but absent from the file.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
